# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: 2019-04-01
type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments
name: AzureVM-Deployment-07
location: eastus
properties:
  expressionEvaluationOptions:
    scopeType: String
  mode:Incremental 
  templateLink:
    uri: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/azure-quickstart-templates/master/101-vm-basic-with-public-ip/azuredeploy.json
  parameters: 
    vmSize : 'Standard_DS2'
    username: 'adminUser'
